reasoning: The Secret Service already interviewed James Comey voluntarily on May 17 without taking him into custody, suggesting there is no immediate threat or probable cause for a swift arrest. Legal experts broadly agree that prosecuting him over the "86 47" post is highly unlikely to succeed due to strong First Amendment protections and Supreme Court precedent regarding "true threats." Furthermore, even if the DOJ were directed to pursue a politically motivated case against him, building an indictment and executing a physical arrest (rather than issuing a summons) within the brief one-month window between the late-May knowledge cutoff and the July 1, 2025 deadline is incredibly improbable. Therefore, the chance of arrest before July 1 is very low.
batch_queries: Will James Comey be arrested before July 1, 2025?
